entries.definition:
sh–r–dh–m (no reported verb in Classical Arabic; in Modern Standard however the quadriliteral تشردم tashardhama ‘to fall into fragments’, is being used) a piece, a fragment; a small group. It occurs once in the Qurʾan.
شرذمة shirdhimatun small or scanty company of people; portion, piece (26:54) إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ these are but a small group.
entries.definition_english:
sh–r–dh–m (no reported verb in Classical Arabic; in Modern Standard however the quadriliteral تشردم tashardhama ‘to fall into fragments’, is being used) a piece, a fragment; a small group. It occurs once in the Qurʾan.
شرذمة shirdhimatun small or scanty company of people; portion, piece (26:54) إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ these are but a small group.
